# AI Launch Copilot Worthiness Review

## Decision

**Status:** Pending human review

## Problem

Founders struggle to turn an early AI prototype into a focused, evidence-backed launch plan.

## Intended Audience

First-time founders preparing an AI product launch

## Evidence Inventory

| Claim | Evidence | Confidence | Next test |
|---|---|---|---|
| The problem is frequent | Assumption | Low | Interview five target users |
| The problem is costly | Assumption | Low | Quantify time or money lost |
| Current alternatives are insufficient | Assumption | Low | Map current workflows |

## Worthiness Questions

- Is the problem important enough to change behavior?
- Can the project reach the intended audience?
- Is there a small, ethical test of demand?
- What result would cause the team to stop?

## Approval Gate

The owner, Example Founder, must record a proceed, revise, or stop decision
before build-stage scope is accepted.
